headline: Dollar General Q1 net income rises 13.3%, lifts FY26 EPS outlook
summary: Net income rose to $444.1m in the quarter while net sales climbed 3.4% year-on-year to $10.78bn, driven by contributions from new stores and growth in same-store sales.

content.title: Dollar General Q1 net income rises 13.3%, lifts FY26 EPS outlook
content.summary: Net income rose to $444.1m in the quarter while net sales climbed 3.4% year-on-year to $10.78bn, driven by contributions from new stores and growth in same-store sales.

headline: Dollar General (NYSE:DG) Reports Q1 CY2026 In Line With Expectations
summary: Discount retailer Dollar General (NYSE:DG) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 3.4% year on year to $10.79 billion. Its GAAP profit of $2 per share was 6.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Dollar General (NYSE:DG) Reports Q1 CY2026 In Line With Expectations
content.summary: Discount retailer Dollar General (NYSE:DG) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 3.4% year on year to $10.79 billion. Its GAAP profit of $2 per share was 6.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Dollar General earnings beat: How high-income consumers factor in
summary: Dollar General (DG) reported first quarter earnings that beat Wall Street's estimates. The company also raised its full-year profit outlook.  Loop Capital Markets managing director and consumer sector head Anthony Chukumba and UBS US hardline and broadline and food retail analyst Michael Lasser chat with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman about the earnings results and the state of the consumer.

content.title: Dollar General earnings beat: How high-income consumers factor in
content.description:
Dollar General (DG) reported first quarter earnings that beat Wall Street's estimates. The company also raised its full-year profit outlook.

Loop Capital Markets managing director and consumer sector head Anthony Chukumba and UBS US hardline and broadline and food retail analyst Michael Lasser chat with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman about the earnings results and the state of the consumer.
content.summary: Dollar General (DG) reported first quarter earnings that beat Wall Street's estimates. The company also raised its full-year profit outlook.  Loop Capital Markets managing director and consumer sector head Anthony Chukumba and UBS US hardline and broadline and food retail analyst Michael Lasser chat with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman about the earnings results and the state of the consumer.
